## 📝 Initial Issue Description

**Describe the issue or feature:**
<!-- Provide a brief description of what you want to report or request -->

**Type of improvement needed:**
- [ ] Bug Report - will be formatted as a professional bug report
- [ ] Feature Request - will be formatted as a user story
- [ ] General Issue - will be automatically detected and improved

**Priority:**
- [ ] High - Urgent, needs immediate attention
- [ ] Medium - Normal priority
- [ ] Low - Can be addressed later

## 🤖 Automatic Improvement

This issue will be automatically improved by QAPilot with:
- ✅ Professional title formatting
- ✅ Comprehensive description with proper structure
- ✅ Appropriate labels and categorization
- ✅ Acceptance criteria
- ✅ Priority assessment

**Just create this issue and QAPilot will handle the rest!**

---

💡 **Tip:** You can also trigger QAPilot improvement by adding `/improve-issue`, `/improve-bug`, or `/improve-story` to any issue description.
